name: Bundled MP3
info:
Plays examples/sounds/beep.mp3 from this package.
The function node builds ~/.node-red/node_modules/node-red-contrib-play/examples/sounds/beep.mp3 when that layout matches your install.
Use a player that supports MP3 on your OS (e.g. mpg123 or mplayer on Linux, afplay on macOS, cmdmp3 on Windows).

name: path to bundled beep.mp3
